title: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Developer
description:
Responsibilities

  • Lead the architectural design and implementation of Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement and/or Finance & Operations modules tailored to the client’s business requirements
  • Develop comprehensive technical specifications and system blueprints for the Dynamics 365 ecosystem
  • Design and implement custom entities, workflows, business rules, and security models within the Dynamics platform
  • Architect and execute seamless integrations between Dynamics 365 and Broadsign SaaS solution for digital signage management
  • Develop and configure Power BI integration for advanced analytics and reporting capabilities
  • Lead hands-on development of custom plugins, workflows, and Power Platform solutions (Power Apps, Power Automate)
  • Configure and customize Dynamics 365 modules to align with media industry workflows and processes
  • Conduct system testing, user acceptance testing coordination, and deployment activities
  • Provide ongoing technical support and optimization recommendations post-implementation

Profile

  • Minimum Bachelor Degree in Computer Science/Engineering, Information Technology or similar modules
  • Minimum 5+ years of hands-on experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365
  • Proven expertise in Dynamics 365 customization, configuration, and Power Platform development
  • Strong experience with system integrations using REST/SOAP APIs, Azure Service Bus, and middleware platforms
  • Demonstrated experience with PowerBI development and advanced analytics implementation
  • Experience integrating Dynamics 365 with SaaS platforms and enterprise systems (SAP integration experience highly preferred)
  • Knowledge of Azure cloud services, particularly Azure Logic Apps, Functions, and Data Factory
  • Broadsign experience advantageous

postedCompany.description:
With strong expertise in digital, new technologies, business processes and data strategy, VISEO assists clients in their digital transformation projects. We help to bring forward new ideas, new ways of collaboration, optimise existing business processes and initiate new business opportunities.

Established in France since 1999, VISEO has a strong team of over 2500 employees working globally across six continents. VISEO Asia was subsequently founded in 2009, with its HQ in Singapore and other counterparts located in Bangkok, Hong Kong, Cebu, Manila and Sydney. As part of the 2020 Business Plan, VISEO is committed to strengthen our international presence, especially in the APAC region.

VISEO Asia has the tenacity and flexibility of a start-up. Join the VISEO family as we put you at the heart of innovation. We ensure the development of your skills by having regular exchanges with peers and coaching by a technical mentor. Have fun while challenging yourself as you participate in agile projects, trainings, internal events, certifications and conferences which will contribute to the growth of your career!
postedCompany.name: VISEO ASIA PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
